turn_question: Build principled spinor-level E-operators + run full 720 double loop to close Ne/Ni|Se/Si.
what_was_tried: spinor weak-measurement POVM keep-branches (phase-preserving) per terrain
isolated fiber-alignment effect at fixed strength (clean monotone geometric knob found)
bipartite coherent information I_c(A>B) on nested shell-cut (repo's strongest bridge kernel)

clean_sub_findings.fiber_alignment_is_a_real_geometric_vari: at fixed strength, phase-return varies monotonically 0.940(aligned)->1.000(transverse) with measurement-axis angle to the fiber. A genuine Axis-3-flavored knob.
clean_sub_findings.phase_return_dominated_by_strength: Ni (source-locked, strong) collapses MOST -> lands with sensing, backwards from intuition. Strength tracks Axis-1.
clean_sub_findings.Ni_geometrically_with_sensing: on the (strength,alignment) plane Ni sits with Se/Si, NOT with Ne. The {Ne,Ni} grouping is not in single-terrain geometry.

doc_grounded_resolution.repo_says: Axis-0 is a scalar readout requiring a bipartite cut-state rho_AB via the Xi bridge; 'cannot be evaluated on a single isolated spinor'; 'the single biggest open problem'. Discrete projection {Ne,Ni}->N/white, {Se,Si}->S/black.
doc_grounded_resolution.strongest_kernel: Phi_0(rho_AB) = -S(A|B) = I_c(A>B) coherent information (shell-cut or history-window pullback; pointwise pullback is MI-trivial).
doc_grounded_resolution.our_test: Bipartite I_c on a nested shell-cut STILL does not split Ne/Ni|Se/Si (I_c magnitude tracks entanglement-preservation = Axis-1).
doc_grounded_resolution.conclusion: Axis-0 (intuition/sensing) is NOT any single-cut dynamical quantity. It is the DISCRETE PERCEIVING-ROLE label {Ne,Ni}=N vs {Se,Si}=S, orthogonal to all channel dynamics (14 readouts confirm). The CONTINUOUS Axis-0 the repo wants is the Xi bridge that must REDUCE to this discrete N/S projection while adding a real-valued Phi_0 — and that bridge requires history-window or multi-shell-cut structure not yet built, NOT a better single-cut functional.

strategic_recommendation: Stop searching for Axis-0 in single-cut dynamics. Build the Xi bridge as a HISTORY-WINDOW pullback (time-averaged I_c over a full 720 trajectory), constrained to reduce to the discrete {Ne,Ni}=N / {Se,Si}=S projection. The discrete projection is the GROUND TRUTH Axis-0 must match; use it as the training target, not a dynamical guess.
